Name: UEngine
Description:
Abstract base class of all Engine classes, responsible for management of systems critical to editor or game systems.
  Also defines default classes for certain engine systems.

Variables.Name: bSubtitlesEnabled

Variables.Description: Flag for forcibly disabling subtitles even if you try to turn them back on they will be off

Variables.Name: MaximumLoopIterationCount
Variables.Description: Script maximum loop iteration count used as a threshold to warn users about script execution runaway

Variables.Name: bOptimizeAnimBlueprintMemberVariableAccess
Variables.Description: Controls whether anim blueprint nodes that access member variables of their class directly should use the optimized path that avoids a thunk to the Blueprint VM. This will force all anim blueprints to be recompiled.

Variables.Name: bAllowMultiThreadedAnimationUpdate
Variables.Description: Controls whether by default we allow anim blueprint graph updates to be performed on non-game threads. This enables some extra checks in the anim blueprint compiler that will warn when unsafe operations are being attempted. This will force all anim blueprints to be recompiled.

Variables.Name: SmoothedFrameRateRange
Variables.Description: Range of framerates in which smoothing will kick in

Variables.Name: bCheckForMultiplePawnsSpawnedInAFrame
Variables.Description:
Whether we should check for more than N pawns spawning in a single frame.
	  Basically, spawning pawns and all of their attachments can be slow.  And on consoles it
	  can be really slow.  If this bool is true we will display a

Variables.Name: NumPawnsAllowedToBeSpawnedInAFrame
Variables.Description: If bCheckForMultiplePawnsSpawnedInAFrame==true, then we will check to see that no more than this number of pawns are spawned in a frame.

Variables.Name: bShouldGenerateLowQualityLightmaps_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Whether or not the LQ lightmaps should be generated during lighting rebuilds.  This has been moved to r.SupportLowQualityLightmaps.

Variables.Name: bAllowMatureLanguage

Variables.Name: CameraRotationThreshold
Variables.Description: camera rotation (deg) beyond which occlusion queries are ignored from previous frame (because they are likely not valid)

Variables.Name: CameraTranslationThreshold
Variables.Description: camera movement beyond which occlusion queries are ignored from previous frame (because they are likely not valid)

Variables.Name: PrimitiveProbablyVisibleTime
Variables.Description: The amount of time a primitive is considered to be probably visible after it was last actually visible.

Variables.Name: MaxOcclusionPixelsFraction
Variables.Description: Max screen pixel fraction where retesting when unoccluded is worth the GPU time.

Variables.Name: bPauseOnLossOfFocus
Variables.Description: Whether to pause the game if focus is lost.

Variables.Name: MaxParticleResize
Variables.Description:
The maximum allowed size to a ParticleEmitterInstance::Resize call.
	 	If larger, the function will return without resizing.

Variables.Name: MaxParticleResizeWarn
Variables.Description: If the resize request is larger than this, spew out a warning to the log

Variables.Name: PhysicErrorCorrection
Variables.Description: Error correction data for replicating simulated physics (rigid bodies)

Variables.Name: NetClientTicksPerSecond
Variables.Description: Number of times to tick each client per second

Variables.Name: DisplayGamma
Variables.Description: Current display gamma setting

Variables.Name: MinDesiredFrameRate
Variables.Description: Minimum desired framerate setting

Variables.Name: DefaultSelectedMaterialColor
Variables.Description: Default color of selected objects in the level viewport (additive)

Variables.Name: SelectedMaterialColor
Variables.Description: Color of selected objects in the level viewport (additive)

Variables.Name: SelectionOutlineColor
Variables.Description: Color of the selection outline color.  Generally the same as selected material color unless the selection material color is being overridden

Variables.Name: SubduedSelectionOutlineColor
Variables.Description: Subdued version of the selection outline color. Used for indicating sub-selection of components vs actors

Variables.Name: SelectedMaterialColorOverride
Variables.Description: An override to use in some cases instead of the selected material color

Variables.Name: bIsOverridingSelectedColor
Variables.Description: Whether or not selection color is being overridden

Variables.Name: bEnableOnScreenDebugMessages
Variables.Description: If true, then disable OnScreenDebug messages. Can be toggled in real-time.

Variables.Name: bEnableOnScreenDebugMessagesDisplay
Variables.Description: If true, then disable the display of OnScreenDebug messages (used when running)

Variables.Name: bSuppressMapWarnings
Variables.Description: If true, then skip drawing map warnings on screen even in non (UE_BUILD_SHIPPING || UE_BUILD_TEST) builds

Variables.Name: bDisableAILogging
Variables.Description: determines whether AI logging should be processed or not

Variables.Name: BlueNoiseScalarTexture
Variables.Description: Tiled blue-noise texture

Variables.Name: BlueNoiseVec2Texture
Variables.Description: Spatial-temporal blue noise texture with two channel output

Variables.Name: BlueNoiseScalarTextureName
Variables.Description: Path of the tiled blue-noise texture

Variables.Name: BlueNoiseVec2TextureName
Variables.Description: Path of the tiled blue-noise texture

Variables.Name: ScreenSaverInhibitorSemaphore
Variables.Description: Semaphore to control screen saver inhibitor thread access.

Variables.Name: bLockReadOnlyLevels
Variables.Description: true if the the user cannot modify levels that are read only.

Variables.Name: ParticleEventManagerClassPath
Variables.Description: Particle event manager

Variables.Name: SelectionHighlightIntensity
Variables.Description: Used to alter the intensity level of the selection highlight on selected objects

Variables.Name: SelectionMeshSectionHighlightIntensity
Variables.Description: Used to alter the intensity level of the selection highlight on selected mesh sections in mesh editors

Variables.Name: BSPSelectionHighlightIntensity
Variables.Description: Used to alter the intensity level of the selection highlight on selected BSP surfaces

Variables.Name: HoverHighlightIntensity
Variables.Description: Used to alter the intensity level of the selection highlight on hovered objects

Variables.Name: SelectionHighlightIntensityBillboards
Variables.Description: Used to alter the intensity level of the selection highlight on selected billboard objects

Variables.Name: NetDriverDefinitions
Variables.Description: A list of named UNetDriver definitions

Variables.Name: ServerActors
Variables.Description: A configurable list of actors that are automatically spawned upon server startup (just prior to InitGame)

Variables.Name: RuntimeServerActors
Variables.Description: Runtime-modified list of server actors, allowing plugins to use serveractors, without permanently adding them to config files

Variables.Name: bStartedLoadMapMovie
Variables.Description: true if the loading movie was started during LoadMap().
